## Motion

- **Slug**: motion
- **Category**: transition
- **Description**: The most popular React animation library — spring physics, layout animations, gestures, exit transitions, and scroll-triggered effects.
- **Library**: motion (motion)
- **Library URL**: https://motion.dev
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 41.6 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 31415
- **Weekly downloads**: 9879561
- **Last updated**: 2026-04
- **Tags**: animation, spring, layout, gesture, transition, exit
- **Keywords**: spring animation, bounce effect, smooth transition, layout morph, card flip, staggered entrance, exit animation, fade in out, scale animation, rotate animation, slide animation, elastic motion, page transition, modal animation, list reorder, tab switch, hover effect, tap feedback, scroll animation, shared layout, drag gesture, swipe dismiss, accordion expand, toast enter exit, 애니메이션, 모션, 전환 효과, 스프링 물리, 레이아웃 애니메이션, 제스처, 드래그, 페이지 전환, framer motion, motion/react, AnimatePresence, whileHover, whileTap, layoutId, spring physics, WAAPI, popmotion

### Install
```bash
bun add motion
```

### Usage
```tsx
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "motion/react";

function AnimatedCard({ isVisible }: { isVisible: boolean }) {
  return (
    <AnimatePresence>
      {isVisible && (
        <motion.div
          initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.8, y: 20 }}
          animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }}
          exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.8, y: -20 }}
          transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 25 }}
          whileHover={{ scale: 1.05 }}
          whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
          className="w-48 h-48 bg-purple-500 rounded-2xl"
        />
      )}
    </AnimatePresence>
  );
}
```

---

## GSAP

- **Slug**: gsap
- **Category**: transition
- **Description**: Professional-grade JavaScript animation library for high-performance tweens, timelines, and complex sequenced animations.
- **Library**: gsap (gsap)
- **Library URL**: https://gsap.com
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 26.6 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 24235
- **Weekly downloads**: 2285879
- **Last updated**: 2025-12
- **Tags**: GSAP, GreenSock, animation, timeline, tween, easing, stagger
- **Keywords**: GSAP, GreenSock, animation, timeline, tween, stagger, easing, elastic, bounce, spring, morph, transform, rotate, scale, fade, sequence, keyframe, interpolation, scroll animation, page transition, loading animation, hover effect, entrance animation, exit animation, motion graphics, micro-interaction, choreography, orchestration, parallax, SVG animation, 애니메이션, 타임라인, 트윈, 모션 그래픽, 시퀀스, 이징, 전환 효과, 스태거, 회전, 스크롤 애니메이션, gsap.to, gsap.from, gsap.timeline, ScrollTrigger, useGSAP, CustomEase, MotionPathPlugin

### Install
```bash
bun add gsap @gsap/react
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";
import { useRef } from "react";
import gsap from "gsap";
import { useGSAP } from "@gsap/react";

gsap.registerPlugin(useGSAP);

export default function GsapExample() {
  const container = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  useGSAP(() => {
    gsap.timeline()
      .from(".box", {
        opacity: 0,
        y: 40,
        rotation: -90,
        stagger: 0.15,
        ease: "back.out(1.7)",
        duration: 0.6,
      })
      .to(".box", {
        scale: 1.2,
        duration: 0.3,
        stagger: 0.08,
        yoyo: true,
        repeat: 1,
      });
  }, { scope: container });

  return (
    <div ref={container} className="flex gap-4 p-8">
      {["#8b5cf6", "#06b6d4", "#f43f5e"].map((c, i) => (
        <div key={i} className="box w-16 h-16 rounded-lg" style={{ backgroundColor: c }} />
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Anime.js

- **Slug**: animejs
- **Category**: transition
- **Description**: Lightweight JavaScript animation engine with stagger, timeline, and spring physics
- **Library**: animejs (animejs)
- **Library URL**: https://animejs.com
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 35.7 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 67019
- **Weekly downloads**: 663834
- **Last updated**: 2026-02
- **Tags**: anime, animejs, anime.js, animation, stagger, timeline, spring
- **Keywords**: stagger grid, ripple animation, wave effect, dot matrix, scale animation, fade animation, color morph, shape morph, spring physics, elastic easing, smooth transition, particle grid, page transition, loading animation, micro interaction, scroll animation, SVG animation, CSS animation, canvas animation, timeline sequencing, keyframe animation, entrance animation, exit animation, hover effect, 애니메이션, 스태거, 웨이브, CSS 애니메이션, SVG 애니메이션, 타임라인, 전환 효과, 물결 효과, 도트 매트릭스, 스프링 물리, anime.js, animejs, WAAPI, Web Animations API, easing functions, cubic-bezier, requestAnimationFrame

### Install
```bash
bun add animejs
```

### Usage
```tsx
import { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import { animate, stagger } from "animejs";

export default function StaggerGrid() {
  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!ref.current) return;
    const dots = ref.current.querySelectorAll(".dot");
    animate(dots, {
      scale: [{ to: 0.2, duration: 400 }, { to: 1, duration: 600 }],
      opacity: [{ to: 1, duration: 400 }, { to: 0.3, duration: 600 }],
      delay: stagger(50, { grid: [10, 6], from: "center" }),
      loop: true,
      ease: "inOutQuad",
    });
  }, []);

  return (
    <div ref={ref} style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(10, 1fr)", gap: 6 }}>
      {Array.from({ length: 60 }).map((_, i) => (
        <div key={i} className="dot" style={{ width: 12, height: 12, borderRadius: "50%", background: "#8b5cf6", opacity: 0.3 }} />
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## tsParticles

- **Slug**: tsparticles-react
- **Category**: background
- **Description**: Highly configurable particle animations with interactive links and physics
- **Library**: @tsparticles/react (@tsparticles/react)
- **Library URL**: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@tsparticles/react
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 0.4 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 0
- **Weekly downloads**: 155193
- **Last updated**: 2026-04
- **Tags**: particle, background, animation, interactive, canvas
- **Keywords**: particle animation, floating particles, connected particles, particle network, particle links, particle background, ambient particles, glowing particles, interactive particles, particle system, particle mesh, particle web, hero background, landing page effect, dark background animation, network visualization, ambient animation, decorative background, portfolio background, interactive background, science visualization, tech background, 파티클, 입자, 배경 효과, 불꽃, 연결선, 입자 애니메이션, 배경 애니메이션, 인터랙티브 배경, tsparticles, canvas animation, physics simulation, particle engine

### Install
```bash
bun add @tsparticles/react @tsparticles/slim @tsparticles/engine
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
import Particles, { initParticlesEngine } from "@tsparticles/react";
import { loadSlim } from "@tsparticles/slim";

export default function ParticleBackground() {
  const [ready, setReady] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    initParticlesEngine((e) => loadSlim(e)).then(() => setReady(true));
  }, []);

  if (!ready) return null;

  return (
    <Particles
      id="particles"
      options={{
        fullScreen: { enable: false },
        particles: {
          number: { value: 50 },
          color: { value: "#a855f7" },
          links: { enable: true, color: "#a855f7", opacity: 0.3 },
          move: { enable: true, speed: 1 },
          size: { value: { min: 1, max: 3 } },
        },
      }}
      className="absolute inset-0"
    />
  );
}
```

---

- **Slug**: react-type-animation
- **Category**: text
- **Description**: Customizable React typing animation component based on typical.
- **Library**: react-type-animation (react-type-animation)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/maxeth/react-type-animation#readme

- **Tags**: react, reactjs, animation, typing, typewriter, react typewriter, typing animation
- **Keywords**: typing effect, typewriter effect, text typing, cursor blinking, letter by letter, character animation, sequential typing, auto typing, animated text, text reveal, typing cursor, blinking cursor, text appear animation, hero text, landing page typing, terminal effect, code typing, chat typing indicator, dynamic text, rotating text, text loop, headline animation, intro animation, 타이핑, 타자기, 텍스트 애니메이션, 커서 깜빡임, 타이핑 효과, 자동 타이핑, 글자 애니메이션, 텍스트 입력 효과, 타자 효과, react, react-type-animation, typical.js, type animation component, typing animation react, typewriter react component

```bash

```

### Usage
```tsx
import { TypeAnimation } from "react-type-animation";

export default function TypingDemo() {
  return (
    <TypeAnimation
      sequence={[
        "Hello, world!",
        2000,
        "Welcome to my site",
        2000,
        "Built with React",
        2000,
      ]}
      wrapper="h1"
      speed={50}
      repeat={Infinity}
      style={{ fontSize: "2rem", fontWeight: "bold" }}
    />
  );
}
```

## Animated Cursor

- **Slug**: react-animated-cursor
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: An animated custom cursor component in React with a trailing dot and ring that scales on hover.
- **Library**: react-animated-cursor (react-animated-cursor)
- **Library URL**: https://stephenscaff.github.io/react-animated-cursor/
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 2.4 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 341
- **Weekly downloads**: 1881
- **Last updated**: 2024-06
- **Tags**: react cursor, custom cursor, animated cursor, trailing cursor
- **Keywords**: animated cursor, custom cursor, cursor dot, cursor ring, trailing cursor, cursor follow, cursor glow, cursor scale, cursor hover effect, smooth cursor, cursor animation, cursor trail, interactive cursor, portfolio cursor, creative cursor, cursor replacement, mouse pointer, mouse follower, cursor customization, ui cursor, web cursor effect, cursor feedback, hover indicator, 커서, 마우스, 포인터, 커스텀 커서, 마우스 커서, 애니메이션 커서, 커서 효과, 마우스 포인터, 커서 따라다니기, react-animated-cursor, cursor component, css cursor, pointer events

### Install
```bash
bun add react-animated-cursor
```

### Usage
```tsx
import AnimatedCursor from "react-animated-cursor";

export default function App() {
  return (
    <div>
      <AnimatedCursor
        innerSize={8}
        outerSize={35}
        innerScale={1}
        outerScale={1.7}
        outerAlpha={0.3}
        innerStyle={{ backgroundColor: "#a78bfa" }}
        outerStyle={{ border: "2px solid #a78bfa" }}
        showSystemCursor={false}
        trailingSpeed={8}
        clickables={["a", "button", ".link"]}
      />
      <h1>Hover around the page!</h1>
      <button>Click me</button>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Cursor Effects

- **Slug**: cursor-effects
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Old-school cursor effects for your browser built in modern JavaScript.
- **Library**: cursor-effects (cursor-effects)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/tholman/cursor-effects#readme
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 7.4 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 3951
- **Weekly downloads**: 990
- **Last updated**: 2026-02
- **Tags**: cursor, trail, mouse, animation, particle
- **Keywords**: cursor trail, mouse trail, fairy dust, rainbow cursor, sparkle trail, cursor particles, glitter cursor, cursor animation, mouse sparkle, trailing effect, cursor glow, mouse particles, interactive cursor, fun mouse effect, cursor decoration, pointer effect, mouse follower, cursor feedback, hover trail, click effect, playful cursor, whimsical interaction, retro cursor, nostalgia web effect, 커서 트레일, 마우스 효과, 페어리 더스트, 무지개 커서, 커서 애니메이션, 마우스 파티클, 커서 꾸미기, 마우스 트레일, 커서 반짝임, canvas cursor, cursor-effects, mouse event animation, pointer trail

### Install
```bash
bun add cursor-effects
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import { fairyDustCursor } from "cursor-effects";

export default function CursorTrailDemo() {
  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!ref.current) return;
    const fx = new fairyDustCursor({ element: ref.current });
    return () => fx.destroy();
  }, []);

  return (
    <div ref={ref} style={{ width: "100%", height: "400px", position: "relative" }}>
      <p>Move your cursor here</p>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Partycles

- **Slug**: partycles
- **Category**: particle
- **Description**: Delightful particle reward animations for React — confetti, stars, hearts, fireworks and more via a simple hook
- **Library**: partycles (partycles)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/jonathanleane/partycles#readme
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 10.5 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 153
- **Weekly downloads**: 2721
- **Last updated**: 2025-08
- **Tags**: react, animations, effects, rewards, confetti, sparkles, particles
- **Keywords**: confetti, sparkles, fireworks, hearts, stars, bubbles, snow, petals, coins, emoji, glitter, burst, explosion, particle shower, floating, celebration animation, reward animation, success feedback, like button effect, gamification, achievement unlock, checkout celebration, form submit reward, social reaction, engagement feedback, micro-interaction, delight, party effect, 파티클, 축하, 보상, 별, 하트, 폭죽, 컨페티, 애니메이션, 리액트 파티클, 축하 효과, 보상 애니메이션, 불꽃놀이, react-hook, useReward, typescript, lightweight, particle-effects, canvas-free, dom-particles

### Install
```bash
bun add partycles
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";
import { useReward } from "partycles";

export default function CelebrateButton() {
  const { reward, isAnimating } = useReward(
    "reward-btn",
    "confetti",
    {
      particleCount: 40,
      spread: 60,
      colors: ["#ff6b6b", "#feca57", "#48dbfb", "#ff9ff3", "#54a0ff"],
    }
  );

  return (
    <button
      id="reward-btn"
      onClick={() => !isAnimating && reward()}
      style={{
        padding: "12px 32px",
        fontSize: 18,
        borderRadius: 12,
        background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed, #d946ef)",
        color: "#fff",
        border: "none",
        cursor: "pointer",
      }}
    >
      {isAnimating ? "🎉" : "Celebrate!"}
    </button>
  );
}
```

---

## Particle Morph

- **Slug**: particle-morph
- **Category**: 3d
- **Description**: WebGL particle engine that morphs thousands of particles into text, images, and shapes with interactive mouse effects and smooth transitions.
- **Library**: particle-morph (particle-morph)
- **Library URL**: https://tbpatj.github.io/Particle-Morph-Engine/demo/
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 12.8 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 2
- **Weekly downloads**: 36
- **Last updated**: 2025-08
- **Tags**: particles, morph, webgl, 3d, interactive, canvas, animation
- **Keywords**: particle morphing, particle animation, particle transition, particle text, particle image, particle shape, webgl particles, floating particles, particle swarm, particle cloud, particle dissolve, morphing effect, hero animation, background effect, interactive particles, text to particles, image to particles, mouse interaction, click effect, hover effect, particle system, visual effect, canvas animation, webgl animation, 파티클 모핑, 3D 입자, 형태 변환, 메시 파티클, 입자 애니메이션, 파티클 시스템, 웹지엘 파티클, 인터랙티브 파티클, webgl2, gpu accelerated, high performance, particle engine

### Install
```bash
bun add particle-morph
```

### Usage
```tsx
import { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import "particle-morph";

export default function ParticleDemo() {
  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const p = (globalThis as any).particles;
    if (!p) return;

    p.init("particle-box", {
      particleCount: 20000,
      backgroundParticleCount: 200,
      mouseInteractionType: "push",
    });
    p.start();

    if (p.ready) {
      p.addInputGroup({
        group: 0,
        xPos: "50%",
        yPos: "50%",
        inputs: [
          { text: "HELLO", color: "#a855f7", align: "center",
            fontSize: "64px", fontWeight: "bold" },
        ],
        allocatedParticles: 8000,
        radius: 2,
        enabled: true,
      });
    }

    return () => { try { p.deleteAllGroups(); } catch {} };
  }, []);

  return <div id="particle-box" ref={ref} style={{ width: "100%", height: 400 }} />;
}
```

## Moving Text

- **Slug**: react-moving-text

- **Description**: CSS text motion presets for React — fade, bounce, slide, swing, jelly, and more with zero config.
- **Library**: react-moving-text (react-moving-text)
- **Library URL**: https://yidaoj.github.io/react-moving-text
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 20.6 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 0
- **Weekly downloads**: 276

- **Tags**: text, animation, motion, css
- **Keywords**: animated text, text animation, moving text, text motion, bounce text, fade in text, swing text, jelly text, pulse text, glowing text, flash text, spin text, blur text, flip text, shake text, hero text animation, heading animation, title effect, landing page text, attention grabber, text entrance, typography animation, text transition, scroll reveal text, animated heading, 텍스트 모션, CSS 애니메이션, 바운스, 페이드, 슬라이드, 텍스트 효과, 움직이는 글자, 타이포그래피 애니메이션, styled-components, css animation presets, react text animation, zero config animation

### Install
```bash

```

### Usage
```tsx
import MovingText from "react-moving-text";

export default function AnimatedHeading() {
  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "1rem" }}>
      <MovingText
        type="bounce"
        duration="1000ms"
        delay="0s"
        direction="alternate"
        timing="ease"
        iteration="infinite"
      >
        Bounce
      </MovingText>
      <MovingText
        type="fadeIn"
        duration="1200ms"
        delay="0.2s"
        direction="alternate"
        timing="ease-in-out"
        iteration="infinite"
      >
        Fade In
      </MovingText>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## Flip Toolkit

- **Slug**: react-flip-toolkit
- **Category**: transition
- **Description**: Configurable FLIP animation helpers for React
- **Library**: react-flip-toolkit (react-flip-toolkit)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/aholachek/react-flip-toolkit#readme
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 7.3 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 4196
- **Weekly downloads**: 117787
- **Last updated**: 2024-09
- **Tags**: react-component, FLIP, transition, animation
- **Keywords**: flip animation, layout animation, smooth transition, card shuffle, grid animation, reorder animation, position animation, element transition, morph animation, stagger animation, spring animation, wobbly animation, list reorder, grid layout, card sorting, drag and drop, filter animation, route transition, shared element, page transition, tab animation, accordion animation, expand collapse, gallery animation, 플립 애니메이션, 레이아웃 애니메이션, 셔플, 카드 정렬, 리스트 전환, 그리드 애니메이션, 위치 전환, 스프링 애니메이션, react-flip-toolkit, FLIP technique, First Last Invert Play, react-component, layout transition, animateLayout

### Install
```bash
bun add react-flip-toolkit
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";
import { useState } from "react";
import { Flipper, Flipped } from "react-flip-toolkit";

const colors = ["#ff6b6b", "#feca57", "#48dbfb", "#ff9ff3"];

function shuffle<T>(a: T[]) {
  const b = [...a];
  for (let i = b.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
    const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
    [b[i], b[j]] = [b[j], b[i]];
  }
  return b;
}

export default function FlipDemo() {
  const [items, setItems] = useState(colors);
  return (
    <Flipper flipKey={items.join()}>
      <button onClick={() => setItems(shuffle)}>Shuffle</button>
      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(2,1fr)", gap: 8 }}>
        {items.map((c) => (
          <Flipped key={c} flipId={c}>
            <div style={{ background: c, height: 80, borderRadius: 8 }} />
          </Flipped>
        ))}
      </div>
    </Flipper>
  );
}
```

---

## Text Scramble

- **Slug**: use-scramble
- **Category**: text
- **Description**: Matrix-style text scramble and decode animation. Characters randomize and resolve into the target string, creating a hacker/cyberpunk reveal effect. Powered by use-scramble.
- **Library**: use-scramble (use-scramble)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/tol-is/use-scramble
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 1.5 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 500
- **Weekly downloads**: 10000
- **Last updated**: 2024-06
- **Tags**: text, scramble, decode, animation, matrix
- **Keywords**: text scramble, scramble effect, decode animation, text decode, matrix text, hacker text, cyber text, glitch text, text reveal, character scramble, letter scramble, text shuffle, randomize text, text morph, cryptic text, cipher animation, characters randomizing, text resolving, letters shuffling, matrix rain text, terminal decode, cyberpunk text, encrypted text reveal, code breaking animation, hero text scramble, landing page effect, title animation, heading reveal, name reveal, tagline scramble, loading text scramble, hover scramble, interactive text, 텍스트 스크램블, 디코드 애니메이션, 해킹 텍스트, 매트릭스 효과, 글리치 텍스트, 문자 셔플, 텍스트 해독, 사이버펑크 텍스트, 암호 해독 애니메이션, 텍스트 변환, 글자 랜덤, 타이틀 효과, use-scramble, useScramble hook, npm use-scramble, react text scramble, react scramble hook

### Install
```bash
npm install use-scramble
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useScramble } from "use-scramble";
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";

const phrases = ["HELLO WORLD", "WELCOME", "LET'S BUILD"];

export default function ScrambleText() {
  const [index, setIndex] = useState(0);

  const { ref, replay } = useScramble({
    text: phrases[index],
    speed: 0.6,
    tick: 1,
    step: 1,
    scramble: 4,
    seed: 2,
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      setIndex((prev) => (prev + 1) % phrases.length);
    }, 3000);
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    replay();
  }, [index, replay]);

  return (
    <p
      ref={ref}
      style={{
        fontSize: "2.5rem",
        fontWeight: 700,
        color: "#ffffff",
        fontFamily: "monospace",
      }}
    />
  );
}
```

---

## Flubber

- **Slug**: flubber
- **Category**: transition
- **Description**: Organic SVG shape morphing with smooth interpolation between arbitrary paths — circles, stars, hearts, and more
- **Library**: flubber (flubber)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/veltman/flubber
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 8.2 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 6400
- **Weekly downloads**: 18000
- **Last updated**: 2022-05
- **Tags**: morphing, svg, shape, interpolation, animation, transition
- **Keywords**: shape morphing, SVG morph, path interpolation, shape transition, organic morphing, smooth morphing, fluid shape, shape animation, path animation, geometry transition, shape shifting, blob morph, circle to star, shape tween, vector morphing, path morph, shape interpolation, SVG path animation, morphing shapes, seamless shape transition, polygon morph, star morph, loading animation, hero animation, interactive shape, generative art, data visualization transition, logo morph, icon animation, creative transition, geometric animation, 모핑, 형태변환, SVG, 쉐이프, 보간, 도형 변환, 경로 애니메이션, 벡터 모핑, 유기적 모핑, 부드러운 전환, 형상 보간, flubber, flubber.js, SVG path interpolation, d3 shape morph, requestAnimationFrame SVG

### Install
```bash
bun add flubber @types/flubber
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { interpolate } from "flubber";

const circle = "M 50,0 A 50,50 0 1,1 50,100 A 50,50 0 1,1 50,0 Z";
const star =
  "M 50,0 L 61,35 L 98,35 L 68,57 L 79,91 L 50,70 L 21,91 L 32,57 L 2,35 L 39,35 Z";
const triangle = "M 50,0 L 100,87 L 0,87 Z";
const heart =
  "M 50,90 C 25,70 0,50 0,30 A 25,25 0 0,1 50,30 A 25,25 0 0,1 100,30 C 100,50 75,70 50,90 Z";

const shapes = [circle, star, triangle, heart];

export default function FlubberDemo() {
  const [shapeIndex, setShapeIndex] = useState(0);
  const pathRef = useRef<SVGPathElement>(null);
  const tRef = useRef(0);
  const interpRef = useRef<((t: number) => string) | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const from = shapes[shapeIndex];
    const to = shapes[(shapeIndex + 1) % shapes.length];
    interpRef.current = interpolate(from, to, { maxSegmentLength: 2 });

    let raf: number;
    tRef.current = 0;

    function tick() {
      tRef.current += 0.015;
      if (tRef.current >= 1) {
        setShapeIndex((i) => (i + 1) % shapes.length);
        return;
      }
      if (pathRef.current && interpRef.current) {
        pathRef.current.setAttribute("d", interpRef.current(tRef.current));
      }
      raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    }

    raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    return () => cancelAnimationFrame(raf);
  }, [shapeIndex]);

  return (
    <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" width={200} height={200}>
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id="morph-grad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
          <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#a855f7" />
          <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#06b6d4" />
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>
      <path ref={pathRef} d={shapes[0]} fill="url(#morph-grad)" />
    </svg>
  );
}
```

---

## Theatre.js

- **Slug**: theatre-core
- **Category**: transition
- **Description**: Motion design editor and animation library for precise, timeline-based choreography — sequence complex multi-property animations with programmatic or visual control.
- **Library**: @theatre/core (@theatre/core)
- **Library URL**: https://www.theatrejs.com
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 48 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 11600
- **Weekly downloads**: 25000
- **Last updated**: 2024-10
- **Tags**: Theatre.js, timeline, sequencer, choreography, motion design, keyframe, animation
- **Keywords**: Theatre.js, theatre, timeline animation, sequencer, keyframe animation, choreography, motion design, orchestrated animation, multi-element animation, coordinated motion, property animation, programmatic animation, cinematic animation, scene animation, complex sequence, staggered animation, entrance choreography, creative coding, animation editor, visual timeline, animation studio, interactive animation, production animation, animation tooling, 타임라인 애니메이션, 시퀀서, 키프레임, 모션 디자인, 안무, 오케스트레이션, 애니메이션 편집기, 장면 애니메이션, 프로그래밍 애니메이션, 시네마틱 애니메이션, @theatre/core, @theatre/react, getProject, sheet, sequence, object, onChange

### Install
```bash
bun add @theatre/core @theatre/react
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";
import { getProject, types } from "@theatre/core";
import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";

// Create a Theatre.js project and sheet
const project = getProject("My Project");
const sheet = project.sheet("Scene");

// Define animated objects with typed props
const box1 = sheet.object("Box 1", {
  x: types.number(0, { range: [-200, 200] }),
  y: types.number(0, { range: [-200, 200] }),
  rotation: types.number(0, { range: [0, 360] }),
  scale: types.number(1, { range: [0, 2] }),
  opacity: types.number(1, { range: [0, 1] }),
});

const box2 = sheet.object("Box 2", {
  x: types.number(0, { range: [-200, 200] }),
  y: types.number(0, { range: [-200, 200] }),
  rotation: types.number(0, { range: [0, 360] }),
  scale: types.number(1, { range: [0, 2] }),
  opacity: types.number(1, { range: [0, 1] }),
});

export default function TheatreExample() {
  const [vals1, setVals1] = useState({ x: 0, y: 0, rotation: 0, scale: 1, opacity: 1 });
  const [vals2, setVals2] = useState({ x: 0, y: 0, rotation: 0, scale: 1, opacity: 1 });

  useEffect(() => {
    const unsub1 = box1.onValuesChange((v) => setVals1(v));
    const unsub2 = box2.onValuesChange((v) => setVals2(v));

    // Play the sequence (0 to 3 seconds, looping)
    project.ready.then(() => {
      sheet.sequence.play({ iterationCount: Infinity, range: [0, 3] });
    });

    return () => { unsub1(); unsub2(); };
  }, []);

  return (
    <div style={{ position: "relative", width: "100%", height: 300 }}>
      <div
        style={{
          position: "absolute",
          left: "30%",
          top: "50%",
          width: 60,
          height: 60,
          borderRadius: 8,
          backgroundColor: "#8b5cf6",
          transform: `translate(${vals1.x}px, ${vals1.y}px) rotate(${vals1.rotation}deg) scale(${vals1.scale})`,
          opacity: vals1.opacity,
        }}
      />
      <div
        style={{
          position: "absolute",
          left: "60%",
          top: "50%",
          width: 60,
          height: 60,
          borderRadius: "50%",
          backgroundColor: "#06b6d4",
          transform: `translate(${vals2.x}px, ${vals2.y}px) rotate(${vals2.rotation}deg) scale(${vals2.scale})`,
          opacity: vals2.opacity,
        }}
      />
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Rive Canvas

- **Slug**: rive-app-react-canvas
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Interactive state-machine-driven vector animations rendered via WebGL/Canvas — the next-gen Lottie alternative with built-in interactivity, physics, and 60fps GPU-accelerated playback
- **Library**: @rive-app/react-canvas (@rive-app/react-canvas)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/rive-app/rive-react#readme
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 43.9 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 1111
- **Weekly downloads**: 693802
- **Last updated**: 2026-04
- **Tags**: rive, canvas, webgl, interactive, animation, state-machine, vector, gpu
- **Keywords**: rive, rive animation, interactive animation, state machine animation, vector animation, canvas animation, webgl animation, gpu accelerated, lottie alternative, real-time animation, interactive vector, animation runtime, motion design, character animation, game animation, micro interaction, loading animation, onboarding animation, interactive illustration, animated icon, hero animation, scroll-triggered animation, hover animation, click animation, 리브, 인터랙티브 애니메이션, 벡터 애니메이션, 캔버스 애니메이션, 상태머신 애니메이션, GPU 가속, 실시간 애니메이션, react-canvas, rive-app, riv file, animation player

### Install
```bash
bun add @rive-app/react-canvas
```

### Usage
```tsx
import { useRive, Layout, Fit, Alignment } from "@rive-app/react-canvas";

export default function RiveAnimation() {
  const { RiveComponent } = useRive({
    src: "https://cdn.rive.app/animations/vehicles.riv",
    stateMachines: "bumpy",
    layout: new Layout({
      fit: Fit.Contain,
      alignment: Alignment.Center,
    }),
    autoplay: true,
  });

  return (
    <div style={{ width: 500, height: 500 }}>
      <RiveComponent />
    </div>
  );
}
```

```tsx
import Spline from "@splinetool/react-spline";

export default function SplineScene() {
  function onLoad(spline: any) {
    // Access the Spline application instance
    console.log("Spline scene loaded", spline);
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: "100%", height: 500 }}>
      <Spline
        scene="https://prod.spline.design/YOUR_SCENE_ID/scene.splinecode"
        onLoad={onLoad}
      />
    </div>
  );
}
```

## Atropos

- **Slug**: atropos
- **Category**: hover
- **Description**: Apple TV-style 3D parallax hover effects — multi-layer depth with touch support, only 2KB gzipped with zero dependencies
- **Library**: atropos (atropos)
- **Library URL**: https://atroposjs.com
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 2.5 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 3575
- **Weekly downloads**: 4097
- **Last updated**: 2025-08
- **Tags**: atropos, parallax, 3d, hover, tilt, depth, apple-tv, touch
- **Keywords**: atropos, 3d parallax, parallax hover, apple tv effect, tilt effect, 3d card, depth effect, multi-layer parallax, hover effect, touch parallax, gyroscope effect, perspective effect, card hover, product card 3d, portfolio card, image parallax, hero card, pricing card 3d, testimonial card, mouse tracking, layered depth, floating elements, 패럴랙스, 3D 호버, 틸트 효과, 깊이감, 입체효과, 애플TV 효과, 카드 호버, 마우스 추적, 레이어 깊이, atropos-js, parallax-tilt, 3d-perspective, hover-depth

### Install
```bash
bun add atropos
```

### Usage
```tsx
import Atropos from "atropos/react";
import "atropos/css";

export default function ParallaxCard() {
  return (
    <Atropos
      className="my-atropos"
      activeOffset={40}
      shadowScale={1.05}
      rotateXMax={15}
      rotateYMax={15}
    >
      <div style={{ padding: 40, borderRadius: 16, background: "#111" }}>
        {/* Background layer — furthest depth */}
        <div data-atropos-offset="-5">
          <div style={{ width: 100, height: 100, borderRadius: "50%", background: "rgba(139,92,246,0.3)", filter: "blur(20px)" }} />
        </div>

        {/* Middle layer */}
        <div data-atropos-offset="5">
          <h2 style={{ color: "white" }}>Hello World</h2>
        </div>

        {/* Front layer — closest to viewer */}
        <div data-atropos-offset="10">
          <button style={{ padding: "8px 16px", background: "#8b5cf6", color: "white", borderRadius: 8 }}>
            Hover me
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </Atropos>
  );
}
```

---

## Confetti Explosion

- **Slug**: react-confetti-explosion
- **Category**: particle
- **Description**: Lightweight CSS-animation based confetti explosion that fires on mount — perfect for celebratory moments
- **Library**: react-confetti-explosion (react-confetti-explosion)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/herrethan/react-confetti-explosion
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 2.2 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 251
- **Weekly downloads**: 128063
- **Last updated**: 2025-06
- **Tags**: confetti, css animation, particles, celebration, burst
- **Keywords**: confetti explosion, confetti burst, particle burst, confetti pop, celebration blast, confetti shower, colorful explosion, confetti spray, party popper, confetti rain, CSS confetti, lightweight confetti, confetti animation, sparkle explosion, festive burst, success animation, reward effect, checkout celebration, form submit reward, game win, achievement animation, user delight, onboarding success, purchase confirmation, level complete, milestone reached, 컨페티 폭발, 축하 효과, 꽃가루, 파티클 버스트, 폭발 애니메이션, 축하 폭죽, 보상 효과, CSS 애니메이션, 파티 효과, react-confetti-explosion, css-based confetti, mount-triggered confetti, zero-dependency confetti

### Install
```bash
bun add react-confetti-explosion
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import ConfettiExplosion from "react-confetti-explosion";

export default function ConfettiDemo() {
  const [isExploding, setIsExploding] = useState(false);

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", alignItems: "center", gap: 24 }}>
      <button
        onClick={() => {
          setIsExploding(false);
          setTimeout(() => setIsExploding(true), 10);
        }}
        style={{
          padding: "12px 24px",
          borderRadius: 8,
          background: "#6366f1",
          color: "white",
          border: "none",
          cursor: "pointer",
          fontSize: 16,
        }}
      >
        Celebrate!
      </button>
      {isExploding && (
        <ConfettiExplosion
          force={0.8}
          duration={3000}
          particleCount={100}
          width={400}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Vivus

- **Slug**: vivus
- **Category**: transition
- **Description**: SVG drawing animation that progressively reveals strokes one by one — draw geometric patterns, logos, and illustrations
- **Library**: vivus (vivus)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/maxwellito/vivus
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 4.2 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 15469
- **Weekly downloads**: 11521
- **Last updated**: 2022-07
- **Tags**: svg, drawing, stroke, animation, reveal, line-art
- **Keywords**: SVG drawing, stroke animation, line drawing, path reveal, SVG line art, progressive drawing, stroke by stroke, draw animation, outline animation, SVG reveal, handwriting effect, sketch animation, pen draw effect, geometric drawing, wireframe animation, logo animation, icon reveal, hero illustration, loading animation, scroll reveal drawing, signature animation, onboarding illustration, landing page art, whiteboard effect, technical drawing, blueprint animation, SVG 드로잉, 스트로크 애니메이션, 선 그리기 효과, 경로 애니메이션, 로고 그리기, 아이콘 드로잉, 손 그림 효과, 윤곽선 애니메이션, 서명 애니메이션, vivus, vivus.js, stroke-dasharray animation, SVG stroke dashoffset, oneByOne animation

### Install
```bash
bun add vivus
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import Vivus from "vivus";

export default function VivusDemo() {
  const svgRef = useRef<SVGSVGElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!svgRef.current) return;

    const vivus = new Vivus(svgRef.current, {
      duration: 200,
      type: "oneByOne",
      animTimingFunction: Vivus.EASE_OUT,
    });

    vivus.play();

    return () => vivus.destroy();
  }, []);

  return (
    <svg
      ref={svgRef}
      viewBox="0 0 200 200"
      width={200}
      height={200}
      fill="none"
    >
      <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="80" stroke="#06b6d4" strokeWidth="2" />
      <polygon
        points="100,30 160,75 140,145 60,145 40,75"
        stroke="#a855f7"
        strokeWidth="2"
        fill="none"
      />
      <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="40" stroke="#22d3ee" strokeWidth="1.5" />
    </svg>
  );
}
```

---

## Dotlottie React

- **Slug**: lottiefiles-dotlottie-react
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: High-performance Lottie animation player for React using the dotLottie format — play rich vector animations from LottieFiles
- **Library**: @lottiefiles/dotlottie-react (@lottiefiles/dotlottie-react)

- **Bundle size**: 33.9 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 489
- **Weekly downloads**: 725868
- **Last updated**: 2026-04
- **Tags**: lottie, dotlottie, animation, vector, player, lottiefiles, canvas
- **Keywords**: Lottie animation, vector animation, dotLottie player, animated illustration, motion graphics, rich animation, smooth vector animation, After Effects animation, Bodymovin, JSON animation, lightweight animation, scalable animation, animation player, looping animation, interactive animation, loading animation, onboarding illustration, hero animation, empty state animation, success animation, error animation, splash screen, micro interaction, animated icon, marketing animation, landing page animation, 로티 애니메이션, 벡터 애니메이션, 모션 그래픽, 로딩 애니메이션, 일러스트 애니메이션, 인터랙티브 애니메이션, 로티파일, 애프터 이펙트, 캔버스 애니메이션, @lottiefiles/dotlottie-react, dotlottie-web, thorvg, LottieFiles, bodymovin, dotLottie format

### Install
```bash
bun add @lottiefiles/dotlottie-react
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { DotLottieReact } from "@lottiefiles/dotlottie-react";

export default function LottieDemo() {
  return (
    <div style={{ width: 300, height: 300 }}>
      <DotLottieReact
        src="https://lottie.host/4db68bbd-31f6-4cd8-84eb-189de081159a/IGmMCqhzpt.lottie"
        autoplay
        loop
        style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
      />
    </div>
  );
}
```

## Granim

- **Slug**: granim
- **Category**: gradient
- **Description**: Create fluid and interactive gradient animations with this small js library. Smooth color transitions morph between multiple gradient states on a canvas element.
- **Library**: granim (granim)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/sarcadass/granim.js#readme
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 4.9 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 5312
- **Weekly downloads**: 4662
- **Last updated**: 2022-12
- **Tags**: gradient, animation, canvas, color, transition
- **Keywords**: gradient animation, fluid gradient, morphing gradient, color transition, gradient morph, smooth gradient, animated gradient, gradient blend, color shift, gradient flow, canvas gradient, diagonal gradient, radial gradient, gradient loop, organic gradient, background animation, hero background, landing page gradient, website background effect, ambient background, dynamic background, gradient wallpaper, color cycling background, gradient overlay, gradient banner, section background, fullscreen gradient, 그라데이션 애니메이션, 유체 그라데이션, 색상 전환, 배경 애니메이션, 그라디언트 효과, 캔버스 그라데이션, 동적 배경, 색상 모핑, 부드러운 그라데이션, 그라데이션 루프, 배경 효과, granim, granim.js, npm granim, canvas gradient animation, javascript gradient, gradient library

### Install
```bash
bun add granim
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useRef, useEffect } from "react";
import Granim from "granim";

export default function GradientBackground() {
  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!canvasRef.current) return;

    const granimInstance = new Granim({
      element: canvasRef.current,
      direction: "diagonal",
      isPausedWhenNotInView: true,
      states: {
        "default-state": {
          gradients: [
            ["#833ab4", "#fd1d1d"],
            ["#fcb045", "#fd1d1d"],
            ["#833ab4", "#fcb045"],
          ],
          transitionSpeed: 3000,
        },
      },
    });

    return () => {
      granimInstance.destroy();
    };
  }, []);

  return (
    <canvas
      ref={canvasRef}
      style={{ width: "100%", height: "400px", display: "block" }}
    />
  );
}
```

---

## Animated Numbers

- **Slug**: react-animated-numbers
- **Category**: text
- **Description**: Smoothly animate number changes with spring physics. Perfect for dashboards, stats counters, and live metrics that update in real time.
- **Library**: react-animated-numbers (react-animated-numbers)
- **Library URL**: https://optimistic-noyce-cf2473.netlify.app/
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 48.8 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 304
- **Weekly downloads**: 22681
- **Last updated**: 2025-06
- **Tags**: text, numbers, animation, counter, spring
- **Keywords**: animated numbers, number animation, counting animation, number counter, rolling numbers, number transition, digit animation, number morph, animated counter, number ticker, digit roll, number flip, spring number animation, smooth counter, live counter, dashboard stats, statistics counter, metrics animation, KPI counter, download counter, star counter, user count animation, price animation, score animation, animated scoreboard, real-time stats, animated dashboard, number display, animated metric, 숫자 애니메이션, 카운터 애니메이션, 숫자 전환, 통계 카운터, 대시보드 숫자, 숫자 모핑, 숫자 롤링, 애니메이션 카운터, 실시간 통계, 숫자 효과, 스프링 애니메이션, react-animated-numbers, npm react-animated-numbers, react number animation, react counter component, animated number component, spring physics counter

### Install
```bash
bun add react-animated-numbers
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import AnimatedNumbers from "react-animated-numbers";

export default function StatsCounter() {
  const [count, setCount] = useState(1000);

  useEffect(() => {
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      setCount((prev) => prev + Math.floor(Math.random() * 100));
    }, 2000);
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, []);

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "0.5rem" }}>
      <AnimatedNumbers
        useThousandsSeparator
        animateToNumber={count}
        fontStyle={{
          fontSize: "2.5rem",
          fontWeight: 700,
          color: "#ffffff",
        }}
        transitions={(index) => ({
          type: "spring",
          duration: index + 0.3,
          damping: 15,
          stiffness: 120,
        })}
      />
      <span style={{ fontSize: "1rem", color: "#888" }}>users</span>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Just Parallax

- **Slug**: react-just-parallax
- **Category**: scroll
- **Description**: Lightweight React library for mouse-move and scroll parallax effects. Create layered depth compositions with elements that respond to cursor position at different speeds.
- **Library**: react-just-parallax (react-just-parallax)
- **Library URL**: https://react-just-parallax.michalzalobny.com/
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 4.3 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 508
- **Weekly downloads**: 1331
- **Last updated**: 2023-03
- **Tags**: parallax, scroll, mouse, animation, depth
- **Keywords**: parallax effect, mouse parallax, scroll parallax, depth effect, layered parallax, floating elements, 3d depth, perspective effect, mouse tracking, cursor parallax, parallax layers, depth composition, floating shapes, mouse-driven animation, interactive depth, hero parallax, landing page parallax, parallax background, mouse follow effect, interactive background, parallax section, scroll animation, depth hover effect, layered hero, parallax portfolio, creative parallax, immersive parallax, 패럴랙스 효과, 마우스 패럴랙스, 스크롤 패럴랙스, 깊이 효과, 마우스 추적, 레이어 애니메이션, 인터랙티브 배경, 시차 효과, 마우스 반응 효과, 패럴랙스 레이어, 3D 깊이 효과, react-just-parallax, npm react-just-parallax, MouseParallax, ScrollParallax, react parallax library, mouse move parallax react, 마우스 움직이면 배경이 살짝 따라오는, 커서 따라 뒤에가 움직이는, 마우스 대면 레이어가 둥둥 떠다니는, 포인터 따라 배경이 미세하게 반응하는, 마우스로 화면이 약간씩 움직이는, 커서 위치에 따라 흔들리는

### Install
```bash
bun add react-just-parallax
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useRef } from "react";
import { MouseParallax } from "react-just-parallax";

export default function ParallaxScene() {
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  return (
    <div
      ref={containerRef}
      style={{
        position: "relative",
        width: "100%",
        height: "400px",
        overflow: "hidden",
        background: "#0a0a0a",
      }}
    >
      {/* Slow background layer */}
      <MouseParallax strength={0.02} parallaxContainerRef={containerRef}>
        <div
          style={{
            width: "200px",
            height: "200px",
            borderRadius: "50%",
            border: "1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.2)",
            position: "absolute",
            top: "50%",
            left: "50%",
            transform: "translate(-50%, -50%)",
          }}
        />
      </MouseParallax>

      {/* Medium speed layer */}
      <MouseParallax strength={0.05} parallaxContainerRef={containerRef}>
        <div
          style={{
            width: "12px",
            height: "12px",
            borderRadius: "50%",
            background: "rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.6)",
            position: "absolute",
            top: "30%",
            left: "25%",
          }}
        />
      </MouseParallax>

      {/* Fast foreground layer */}
      <MouseParallax strength={0.1} parallaxContainerRef={containerRef}>
        <div
          style={{
            width: "8px",
            height: "8px",
            background: "rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.7)",
            position: "absolute",
            top: "60%",
            right: "30%",
            transform: "rotate(45deg)",
          }}
        />
      </MouseParallax>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Simple Parallax

- **Slug**: simple-parallax-js
- **Category**: scroll
- **Description**: Lightweight image parallax effect that applies smooth CSS transforms to images on scroll. Zero dependencies, works with any img element.
- **Library**: simple-parallax-js (simple-parallax-js)
- **Library URL**: https://simpleparallax.com
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 3.6 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 1800
- **Weekly downloads**: 35400
- **Last updated**: 2025-09
- **Tags**: parallax, scroll, image, animation, transform, lightweight
- **Keywords**: simple parallax, image parallax, scroll parallax image, parallax scrolling, parallax effect, lightweight parallax, css transform parallax, image scroll effect, parallax background, smooth parallax, scroll driven animation, parallax section, floating image, depth illusion, image movement, scroll transform, sliding image, image offset scroll, viewport parallax, visual depth, image shift, hero image parallax, landing page parallax, product image scroll, portfolio parallax image, background parallax, photo parallax, gallery parallax, image showcase scroll, visual storytelling, 심플 패럴랙스, 이미지 패럴랙스, 스크롤 이미지 효과, 패럴랙스 스크롤링, 이미지 스크롤, 가벼운 패럴랙스, 이미지 변환 효과, 스크롤 패럴랙스 이미지, 시차 이미지, simple-parallax-js, simpleParallax, image transform scroll, parallax orientation, overflow hidden parallax, scale parallax, 스크롤하면 이미지가 천천히 올라오는, 사진이 스크롤보다 느리게 움직이는, 이미지가 고정된것처럼 천천히 지나가는, 스크롤할때 사진이 살짝 밀리는, 배경사진이 느리게 따라오는, 이미지가 떠있는것처럼 스크롤되는

### Install
```bash
bun add simple-parallax-js
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import SimpleParallax from "simple-parallax-js";

export default function ParallaxImage() {
  return (
    <SimpleParallax scale={1.5} orientation="down" overflow>
      <img
        src="/your-image.jpg"
        alt="Parallax"
        className="w-full h-auto rounded-xl"
      />
    </SimpleParallax>
  );
}
```

## React Parallax

- **Slug**: react-parallax
- **Category**: scroll
- **Description**: Classic background parallax sections with configurable scroll strength, blur effects, and multi-layer support. Perfect for hero banners and landing pages.
- **Library**: react-parallax (react-parallax)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/rrutsche/react-parallax
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 4.1 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 871
- **Weekly downloads**: 10100
- **Last updated**: 2025-03
- **Tags**: parallax, scroll, background, hero, animation, section
- **Keywords**: react parallax, background parallax, parallax hero, parallax section, scroll parallax background, parallax banner, hero parallax, background scroll effect, parallax container, landing page parallax, section parallax, background depth, background movement, hero depth, scroll background shift, layered background, depth background, moving background, fixed background scroll, background offset, visual depth section, hero banner parallax, product landing parallax, fullscreen parallax, portfolio hero, marketing page parallax, showcase parallax, story section parallax, immersive hero, scroll section effect, 리액트 패럴랙스, 배경 패럴랙스, 히어로 패럴랙스, 패럴랙스 섹션, 배경 스크롤 효과, 랜딩페이지 패럴랙스, 패럴랙스 배너, 섹션 패럴랙스, 배경 깊이 효과, react-parallax, Parallax component, bgImage, parallax strength, blur parallax, parallax renderLayer, 배경이미지가 고정되면서 느리게 움직이는, 히어로 배경이 스크롤보다 느린, 배경 깔고 스크롤하면 뒤에가 천천히, 풀스크린 배경이 살짝만 움직이는, 랜딩페이지 배경이 따로 움직이는, 배경화면이 느리게 지나가는

### Install
```bash
bun add react-parallax
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { Parallax } from "react-parallax";

export default function HeroParallax() {
  return (
    <Parallax
      bgImage="/hero-background.jpg"
      strength={400}
      blur={{ min: -1, max: 3 }}
    >
      <div className="h-screen flex items-center justify-center">
        <h1 className="text-white text-5xl font-bold">
          Your Hero Content
        </h1>
      </div>
    </Parallax>
  );
}
```

---

## Parallax Mouse

- **Slug**: react-parallax-mouse
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Mouse cursor-driven parallax layers where elements follow your cursor at different speeds, creating a fluid depth effect. Lightweight and easy to set up.
- **Library**: react-parallax-mouse (react-parallax-mouse)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/nicobrinkkemper/react-parallax-mouse
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 1.8 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 150
- **Weekly downloads**: 5360
- **Last updated**: 2023-11
- **Tags**: parallax, mouse, cursor, depth, animation, interactive, hover
- **Keywords**: mouse parallax, cursor parallax, parallax mouse movement, mouse driven parallax, cursor depth effect, mouse tracking parallax, interactive parallax, pointer parallax, mouse follow effect, cursor driven layers, mouse position parallax, hover parallax, floating layers mouse, depth cursor movement, layered mouse effect, mouse responsive layers, cursor depth layers, interactive depth, fluid movement, mouse reactive, cursor tracking layers, hero mouse parallax, interactive landing page, mouse hover depth, portfolio mouse effect, card hover parallax, product showcase mouse, interactive background, mouse driven hero, cursor interactive page, 마우스 패럴랙스, 커서 패럴랙스, 마우스 추적 효과, 마우스 깊이 효과, 커서 따라가기, 인터랙티브 패럴랙스, 마우스 반응형 레이어, 커서 기반 깊이, 마우스 움직임 효과, react-parallax-mouse, MouseParallaxContainer, MouseParallaxChild, factorX, factorY, mouse factor parallax, cursor offset layers, 마우스 움직이면 요소들이 따라오는, 커서에 반응해서 떠다니는, 마우스 따라 앞뒤가 다른 속도로 움직이는, 포인터 따라 레이어가 흔들리는, 마우스로 입체감 나는, 커서 움직이면 배경이 약간 밀리는

### Install
```bash
bun add react-parallax-mouse
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import {
  MouseParallaxContainer,
  MouseParallaxChild,
} from "react-parallax-mouse";

export default function MouseParallax() {
  return (
    <MouseParallaxContainer
      globalFactorX={0.3}
      globalFactorY={0.3}
      className="relative w-full h-screen overflow-hidden"
    >
      {/* Background — moves slowly */}
      <MouseParallaxChild factorX={0.03} factorY={0.03} className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="w-96 h-96 rounded-full bg-purple-500/15 blur-3xl" />
      </MouseParallaxChild>

      {/* Foreground — moves faster */}
      <MouseParallaxChild factorX={0.1} factorY={0.1} className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
        <h1 className="text-white text-4xl font-bold">Move your mouse</h1>
      </MouseParallaxChild>
    </MouseParallaxContainer>
  );
}
```

---

## Swipe Parallax Transition

- **Slug**: swipe-parallax-transition
- **Category**: transition
- **Description**: iOS-style page transition where foreground and background layers move at different speeds during swipe, creating a natural depth parallax effect. Powered by Motion.
- **Library**: motion (motion)
- **Library URL**: https://motion.dev
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 41.6 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 31415
- **Weekly downloads**: 9879561
- **Last updated**: 2026-04
- **Tags**: parallax, swipe, transition, page, animation, depth, gesture, interactive
- **Keywords**: swipe parallax, page transition parallax, iOS transition, swipe page effect, parallax page transition, slide parallax, page swipe depth, transition depth effect, swipe animation, slide transition parallax, layered page transition, iOS page swipe, foreground background speed, layer speed difference, depth transition, sliding layers, parallax slide, differential scrolling, page slide depth, smooth page parallax, natural depth swipe, onboarding swipe, gallery transition, product carousel parallax, app intro parallax, walkthrough parallax, story swipe, card stack parallax, page navigation parallax, swipe gallery, mobile page transition, app screen transition, carousel parallax, 스와이프 패럴랙스, 페이지 전환 패럴랙스, iOS 전환 효과, 스와이프 전환, 패럴랙스 페이지 전환, 슬라이드 패럴랙스, 깊이감 전환, 레이어 속도차 전환, 아이폰 스와이프 효과, 패럴랙스 슬라이드, 화면 전환 깊이, 스와이프 깊이 효과, motion, AnimatePresence, drag gesture, swipe gesture, page transition animation, parallax offset, layer velocity, 넘기면 뒤에것도 같이 움직이는데 느리게, 화면 전환할때 배경이 따라오는, 스와이프하면 앞뒤 속도가 다른, 페이지 넘기면 뒤에가 천천히 따라오는, 아이폰처럼 옆으로 밀면 배경도 움직이는, 슬라이드할때 레이어별로 속도 다른

### Install
```bash
bun add motion
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "motion/react";

const pages = [
  { bg: "#1e1b4b", title: "Welcome" },
  { bg: "#1a2e1a", title: "Features" },
  { bg: "#2a1a1a", title: "Get Started" },
];

// Background moves at 40% of foreground speed — the parallax
const BG_FACTOR = 0.4;

export default function SwipeParallax() {
  const [[current, direction], setCurrent] = useState([0, 0]);

  const paginate = (dir: number) => {
    setCurrent(([prev]) => {
      const next = prev + dir;
      if (next < 0 || next >= pages.length) return [prev, 0];
      return [next, dir];
    });
  };

  return (
    <div className="relative w-full h-screen overflow-hidden">
      <AnimatePresence initial={false} custom={direction} mode="popLayout">
        {/* Background — moves slower (parallax) */}
        <motion.div
          key={`bg-${current}`}
          custom={direction}
          initial={(d: number) => ({ x: `${d * 100 * BG_FACTOR}%` })}
          animate={{ x: "0%" }}
          exit={(d: number) => ({ x: `${d * -100 * BG_FACTOR}%` })}
          transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30 }}
          className="absolute inset-0"
          style={{ backgroundColor: pages[current].bg }}
        />

        {/* Foreground — moves at full speed */}
        <motion.div
          key={`fg-${current}`}
          custom={direction}
          initial={(d: number) => ({ x: `${d * 100}%` })}
          animate={{ x: "0%" }}
          exit={(d: number) => ({ x: `${d * -100}%` })}
          transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30 }}
          drag="x"
          dragConstraints={{ left: 0, right: 0 }}
          dragElastic={0.3}
          onDragEnd={(_e, info) => {
            if (info.offset.x < -50) paginate(1);
            else if (info.offset.x > 50) paginate(-1);
          }}
          className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center"
        >
          <h1 className="text-white text-4xl font-bold">
            {pages[current].title}
          </h1>
        </motion.div>
      </AnimatePresence>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Floating Reactions

- **Slug**: floating-reactions
- **Category**: particle
- **Description**: Live-stream style floating reactions — emojis rise from the bottom with a fade-in, gently bob in place, then quickly slide up and disappear. Seen in Instagram Live, TikTok, and chat apps.
- **Library**: motion (motion)
- **Library URL**: https://motion.dev
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 41.6 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 31415
- **Weekly downloads**: 9879561
- **Last updated**: 2026-04
- **Tags**: emoji, reaction, float, animation, particle, interactive, transition
- **Keywords**: floating reactions, floating emoji, live reactions, rising emoji, bubble reactions, emoji float up, live stream reactions, floating hearts, emoji bubbles, reaction animation, emoji rise fade, float up animation, emojis rising from bottom, hearts floating up, bubbles going up, fade in float up, gentle bobbing emoji, emoji slide up exit, reactions floating upward, soft rising particles, emoji entrance exit, instagram live hearts, tiktok reactions, chat reactions, live stream emoji, social media reactions, real-time reactions, audience reactions, like button animation, engagement animation, celebration emoji, feedback animation, interactive reactions, 플로팅 리액션, 떠오르는 이모지, 라이브 리액션, 이모지 올라가는, 플로팅 하트, 반응 애니메이션, 이모지 버블, 실시간 리액션, 떠다니는 이모지, 이모지가 밑에서 위로 올라오는, 하트가 둥둥 떠다니는, 밑에서 올라오면서 페이드인되는, 이모지가 떠있다가 위로 사라지는, 인스타 라이브처럼 하트 올라가는, 틱톡처럼 이모지 둥둥 뜨는, 밑에서 살짝 올라와서 둥둥 떠있는, 반응 누르면 이모지가 올라가는, motion, AnimatePresence, float animation, staggered entrance, opacity transition, y-axis animation

### Install
```bash
bun add motion
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState, useCallback } from "react";
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "motion/react";

const EMOJIS = ["❤️", "🔥", "😂", "👏", "🎉", "✨"];

interface Reaction {
  id: number;
  emoji: string;
  x: number;
}

let nextId = 0;

export default function FloatingReactions() {
  const [reactions, setReactions] = useState<Reaction[]>([]);

  const addReaction = useCallback((emoji?: string) => {
    const picked = emoji || EMOJIS[Math.floor(Math.random() * EMOJIS.length)];
    const x = 30 + Math.random() * 40;
    const id = nextId++;

    setReactions((prev) => [...prev, { id, emoji: picked, x }]);
    setTimeout(() => {
      setReactions((prev) => prev.filter((r) => r.id !== id));
    }, 3000);
  }, []);

  return (
    <div className="relative w-full h-96 overflow-hidden bg-black">
      {/* Floating reactions */}
      <AnimatePresence>
        {reactions.map((r) => (
          <motion.div
            key={r.id}
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 40, scale: 0.5 }}
            animate={{
              opacity: [0, 1, 1, 0],
              y: [40, -20, -40, -120],
              scale: [0.5, 1.2, 1, 0.8],
              x: [0, Math.random() * 20 - 10, Math.random() * 16 - 8, 0],
            }}
            transition={{
              duration: 2.8,
              times: [0, 0.2, 0.7, 1],
              ease: "easeOut",
            }}
            className="absolute text-3xl pointer-events-none"
            style={{ left: `${r.x}%`, bottom: "20%" }}
          >
            {r.emoji}
          </motion.div>
        ))}
      </AnimatePresence>

      {/* Trigger buttons */}
      <div className="absolute bottom-4 left-0 right-0 flex justify-center gap-2">
        {EMOJIS.map((emoji) => (
          <button
            key={emoji}
            onClick={() => addReaction(emoji)}
            className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-white/10 text-lg
                       hover:bg-white/20 transition-colors"
          >
            {emoji}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---
